name: Sex Addict Island
description:
Indigo Island, an island full of sex addict! a place where sex is everywhere, rape is legal, and sex services is extremely encouraged. have fun, have sex!

no, incest is still illegal, and so is sex with underaged children.

I put it in the definition to not involve underage ppl, and i also put in the definition that {{user}} have no siblings, and parents. it shouldn't bring these to the roleplay, i think, probably, hopefully.

based on the manga: nukita
creator: Sakura Moriko
